name: companion-substrate-closure
currentMilestone: M5 (deferred — BREAKING, needs green campaign + human T3 sign-off)
goal: blackhole as autonomous mercure over a shared artifact substrate: same code quality, interrupts only when needed, decisions banked durably for future implementations

milestones.title: ADR-011 — implement-time accretion control
milestones.summary: Reuse aperture split + rule-of-three, Scout/defer by scope, pointer retargeting, parity-audit + ADR-008 housekeeping

milestones.title: E1 — repo-convention schema precedence
milestones.summary: doc-governance precedence extended to INDEX header + ADR frontmatter; 4 consumers updated

milestones.title: E4 — durable decision memory
milestones.summary: decision_records[] schema + validator, implementer emission, orchestrator serial append, reference/decision-log.md, reviewer audit

milestones.title: E2 — human-approved promotion path
milestones.summary: Note-mismatch repair (fixes live bug), resume_context directive, planner 4.8 third branch

milestones.title: E3 — Active Constraints write path
milestones.summary: Trigger A on ADR promotion + Trigger B mandatory analyze seeding

milestones.title: E5 — autonomy default flip
milestones.summary: enabled:true, brainstorm_routing pinned false; ONLY BREAKING change; lands alone after one green campaign

bindingConstraints: src/ is the only editable source — rebuild via `bun run build`; CI blocks platform-tree drift
M0: reviewer.md tolerance MUST land before implementer.md emits the new artifact form
M5 lands alone, last — only BREAKING change (3 behavioural consumers); rollback = autonomy.enabled:false
planner never computes its own design-autonomy verdict (ADR-010) — M2 promotes on a human verdict passed as directive context
V-CONTENTGATE-01: orchestrator.md sections are grow-never — new budgeted section + pointer, never inline growth
knownLiveBug: phase-plan.md sets notes: awaiting-design-approval but coordinator.md:185 and queue-dag.md:39 do not recognise it — design-track blocks never resume today. Fixed in M2 T1; extractable as a standalone hotfix.
retiredMetric: 'Kaizen refactor yield trends to zero' is unachievable — all 9 filed [Kaizen] issues (#274-#282) are out-of-diff hunter findings over pre-existing code.
planningFindings: M0: no CI check enforces the binding T1->T2 landing order; a squash/cherry-pick could reintroduce the unrecognised-artifact failure. Procedural risk, flagged in plan.

M1: detection should be a bash helper (scripts/detect-doc-schema.sh) reusing the detect-frontend.sh / detect-monorepo.sh precedent — a TypeScript helper would be a third variant of a solved concern (V-INT-03).
M2: a FOURTH notes-enum consumer found at src/SKILL.md:95 beyond the three named in the milestone. T1 confirmed safely extractable as a standalone hotfix.

M3: proposed 3-question test for 'cross-cutting non-negotiable' (breadth >=2 subsystems / enforcement stakes / forecloses a category); >=2 of 3 promotes. Added T0 to clear template placeholders before seeding.

M4: reviewer.md sections run through §14; the milestone's '§10' was wrong and the planner's first '§15' choice collided too. Corrected to a new §15. Also confirmed the grow-never baseline blocks inline growth of '## Background worker barrier' (46 LOC).

M5: three blast-radius sites confirmed with file:line — planner.md:106,169 (design), phase-handle.md:70 + queue-dag.md:82 (analyze), orchestrator.md:157 (brainstorm, AND-gated inert via pinned brainstorm_routing:false).
structureNote: Canonical x-initiative layout: each milestone-N.md IS the full x-planner plan (mode-create Phase 4). No separate documentation/plans/ files — those are for standalone /x-plan runs.
